title: leptinella intermedia
intro: Leptinella intermedia, also known as Brachyglottis microphylla var. ciliata or New Zealand snow daisy, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Leptinella intermedia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies in New Zealand and Australia.
